evidence.source_title: Iran's Foreign Ministry ran a covert influence operation involving Western experts
evidence.description: Ali Vaez was listed as a co-author on early versions of the How Sanctions Work project alongside Narges Bajoghli. Vaez was later identified by Semafor and Iran International as a participant in the Iran Experts Initiative (IEI), a covert Iranian Foreign Ministry influence operation.

editorial_notes: Co-authorship with an IEI-documented figure on the sanctions topic is editorially relevant context, absent evidence of direct coordination on Bajoghli's part.
